title: Flights & Flatbread with Titus Vineyards
description:
Join us on Tuesday, March 10th from 4–8 PM at Whispering Vine – Fourth Street for an evening of bold Napa Valley wines perfectly paired with fresh flatbread. We’re excited to welcome special guest Tom Bailey for this guided tasting experience featuring the expressive wines of Titus Vineyards.

Tasting Fee: $35 (Includes flatbread and a tasting of all featured wines)

Reserve your Spot

Featured Wines:

• Titus Cabernet Sauvignon Napa Valley 2022 – Spiced crushed raspberries, peppery herbs, and hints of white smoke lead into silky textures and ripe red fruits, finishing long with gently grippy tannins and vibrant energy.

• Titus Zinfandel 2023 – Bursting with ripe blackberry, boysenberry, and warm spice, this bold Zin delivers lush, concentrated fruit framed by supple tannins and a lively, satisfying finish.

• Titus Andronicus Napa Valley Red 2021 – A rich Napa blend layered with dark berry, plum, cedar, sweet tobacco leaf, and cocoa, offering velvety texture and a structured, lingering finish.

• Titus Sauvignon Blanc 2024 – Bright and aromatic with melon, mandarin, guava, and lemongrass, balanced by crisp acidity and citrus zest that carries through a clean, refreshing finish.

Enjoy an evening of handcrafted Napa wines, great food, and expert insight from our guest host. Gather your friends and experience Titus Vineyards in a relaxed, delicious Flights & Flatbread setting.
